name: Curve Presets
description: A compact widget providing instant access to a library of professional easing curves. Apply standard interpolations (Sine, Quad, Expo, etc.) or complex custom shapes (Spring, Elastic, Whip) to your selected keyframes with a single click.

steps.args: const raw = JSON.parse(results[0]); let kfs = []; let animId = ''; if (raw.keyframes && typeof raw.keyframes === 'object') { const entries = Object.entries(raw.keyframes); if (!entries.length) throw new Error('Select keyframes in the graph editor first.'); animId = entries[0][0]; for (const [aid, arr] of entries) arr.forEach(k => kfs.push(k)); } if (!kfs.length) throw new Error('Select at least 1 keyframe.'); setVar('animationId', animId); if (vars.mode === 'kease') { if (kfs.length < 2) throw new Error('Kease presets need exactly 2 keyframes selected.'); const sorted = kfs.filter(k => typeof k.value === 'number').sort((a,b) => a.frame - b.frame); if (sorted.length < 2) throw new Error('Need 2 numeric keyframes.'); const k1 = sorted[0], k2 = sorted[sorted.length-1]; const pts = JSON.parse(vars.kdata); const fRange = k2.frame - k1.frame; const vRange = k2.value - k1.value; const add = []; for (let i = 1; i < pts.length - 1; i++) { add.push({ objectId: k1.objectId, propertyKey: Number(k1.propertyKey), frame: Math.round(k1.frame + pts[i][0] * fRange), value: Math.round((k1.value + pts[i][1] * vRange) * 1000) / 1000, interpolationType: 'cubic', cubicParams: { x1: 0.4, y1: 0, x2: 0.2, y2: 1 } }); } const change = [{ keyframeId: k1.keyframeId, interpolationType: 'cubic', cubicParams: { x1: 0.4, y1: 0, x2: 0.6, y2: 1 } }]; setVar('payload', { animationId: animId, add: add, change: change }); setVar('kfCount', String(add.length + ' added')); } else { const changes = kfs.map(k => ({ keyframeId: k.keyframeId, interpolationType: 'cubic', cubicParams: { x1: Number(vars.x1), y1: Number(vars.y1), x2: Number(vars.x2), y2: Number(vars.y2) } })); setVar('payload', { animationId: animId, change: changes }); setVar('kfCount', String(kfs.length)); }
steps.label: Build changes
